title: A New Studio and a Big Mistake
article_text: A lawyer wanted to open a new art studio in the industrial area. He had to assess the proper location and register the business. He did not have enough money to afford the space, so he tried to acquire a loan. A tourist came to look at the studio and gave him a signal to relax. The lawyer made an error in the contract and a suspect complained about it. He lost his confidence and had to arrest his plans for a while. From a different perspective, the mistake was a valuable asset. He learned to switch his focus and improve every component of the project. Now he has a fairly good studio, and he can offer a cup of coffee to visitors. His description of the artwork gives them a proper understanding of the pieces.
